user.title: Connect to Hager TJA470 Intercom
user.description: Please enter the connection details for your Hager TJA470 Intercom.

no_devices.title: No Free Client Slots Available
no_devices.description:
No free device slots were found on the Hager TJA470 Intercom. Please:
1. Log in to the TJA470 web config panel.
2. Navigate to Settings > Access control / Clients.
3. Add a new mobile device or client to free up a pairing slot.

Once added, click Submit to search again.

free_device.title: Select Client Slot
free_device.description: Select the free device slot to pair with this Home Assistant instance.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Hager TJA470 Intercom
reauth_confirm.description: Your credentials for the Hager TJA470 Intercom are no longer valid. Please enter new credentials.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Hager TJA470 Intercom
reconfigure.description: Update the connection details for your Hager TJA470 Intercom.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Hager TJA470. Please verify the IP address or host.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Please check the username and password.

abort.already_configured: This Hager TJA470 Intercom is already configured.

init.title: Configure Intercom Notifications

no_clients_found.message: No TJA470 integration clients found. Make sure the integration is loaded and a device is targeted.

open_door_at_position_failed.message: Failed to open door at position {position}: {error}

provisioning_not_loaded.message: Provisioning data is not yet loaded. Please wait for the integration to initialize.

sip_phone_failed.title: SIP phone failed to start
sip_phone_failed.description: The SIP phone for the TJA470 Intercom at {host} failed to start. Incoming calls will not be received. Check your network configuration and reload the integration to retry.
